history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy, styled hair is taking a mirror selfie in a bathroom. He is wearing a royal blue polo shirt. His left hand is raised, holding a black smartphone in front of him, with the flash on, creating a bright glare and lens flare effect that illuminates his face and chest. His expression is a slight grimace or pout. The background consists of white tiled walls with subtle grey veining, and a louvered vent or air conditioning unit is visible on the wall behind him. The lighting is harsh and direct due to the phone's flash, casting sharp shadows and highlighting the textures of his skin and hair. A faint green light from the phone's screen is also visible on his neck. The overall mood is casual and slightly moody, typical of a selfie taken in a personal space. A red and white string bracelet with a small turquoise charm is visible on his right wrist.
